title: callista pulchella
intro: Callista pulchella, also known as the "beauty shell," is a type of orchid native to Australia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Callista pulchella include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Callista pulchella is often made into a tincture, tea, or poultice to utilize its medicinal properties.
